data.content: Approved: loom/knots_sdlc/prompts/ files (implementation.md, implementation_review.md, shipment.md, shipment_review.md) updated with same {{ output }} template variable pattern used in skills prompts. Output section descriptions now use delivery-target-explicit language: remote_main for direct branch review/merge, pr for pull request. Tests in loom_compat_bundle.rs verify all prompts contain both output-specific blocks.
